# Feature: Voicebox Qwen TTS warm-up on voice modal open

<!-- auto-generated by /implement on 2026-07-13 -->

## Intent

Custom voice (Qwen) users wait minutes on cold start because the model loads into RAM only on first `/generate`. When opening the character voice modal, Scriptony should proactively warm Qwen via Voicebox (short silent generate) so "Stimme erzeugen" and previews start faster.

## Preconditions

- Desktop (`npm run dev:desktop`) + `.scriptony` project open
- Voicebox reachable; at least one Voicebox profile exists OR character has `baseVoiceId` for warm-up target
- `model_loaded: false` on `/health` (cold RAM)

## Happy Path

- [ ] Opening `VoiceProfileEditorModal` with cold model triggers background warm-up (German progress after 5s via global loading)
- [ ] Warm-up uses `qwen_custom_voice` and minimal text (`Ja.`)
- [ ] After success, `model_loaded` hint hides and voice design/TTS reuse warm model
- [ ] Skips when `model_loaded: true` or TTS already succeeded this session
- [ ] Skips silently when no Voicebox profile exists yet (first-time user)

## Edge Cases

- [ ] Warm-up failure does not block modal — user can still design/generate
- [ ] Concurrent modal opens share one in-flight warm-up (deduped)
- [ ] Works with character `voiceId` when assigned; falls back to first `GET /profiles` entry

## Regression

- [ ] Existing timeout/retry generation behavior unchanged
- [ ] `npm run verify -- --frontend` passes

## Assumptions

- Voicebox has no dedicated preload API — warm-up via `/generate` is the supported path
- One short warm-up WAV in `.scriptony/voicebox-output/` is acceptable

## Implementation Notes

- `src/lib/voicebox/voicebox-tts-warmup.ts` — `warmUpVoiceboxQwenTts` + deduped in-flight guard
- `src/components/characters/VoiceProfileEditorModal.tsx` — warm-up once per modal open via `runWithProgress`
- Includes prior timeout slice: `voicebox-tts-generation.ts`, extended poll/retry in `voicebox-api.ts`, parallel B/C synthesis
- Tests: `voicebox-tts-warmup.test.ts`, `voicebox-tts-generation.test.ts`
- `npm run verify -- --frontend` — PASS
